name: Sengoku Japan — Warring States
description: Japan in the age of the warring states. Thirty-eight provinces from Satsuma to Ezo contest the realm as the great clans — Shimazu, Mōri, Oda, Takeda, Uesugi, Hōjō, Date, Tokugawa — fight to march on Kyōto and unify the country. Mountain passes and the Inland Sea draw every front.
